title: The MiRooms
description: This modpack adds the ability to enter the backrooms
body:
The MiRooms - are you afraid of luminal spaces? Everything is so similar, nothing but labyrinths, no exit, no hope, no salvation, but THEY are there. Will you have the strength to overcome this challenge and escape this space? 🤔You need to find out, or... just avoid falling through the textures?... and live a normal life, but one way or another, you'll have to face them.
I can only wish you a pleasant game👋
WARNING: THIS ASSEMBLY CONTAINS BRIGHT FLASHES THAT COULD CAUSE AN EPILEPTIC SEIZURE🫣
![You can set up cameras to keep an eye on backroom monsters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc487e46d80bc380b40eaf20dd49ae674b1200b8.png)
